step_1_image_prompt: An overhead flat-lay shot on a polished white marble kitchen island with subtle grey veining. Arranged across the composition: a ceramic matcha bowl with a bamboo whisk resting inside at the upper-left, a clear glass of water with subtle condensation at the upper-right, an open leather journal with a brass pen resting diagonally across the spread at the center-right, a small beige plate with a folded linen napkin and two slices of avocado toast at the lower-right, and a single sprig of fresh eucalyptus at the upper-center. The lower-left third of the composition is intentionally empty — clean marble surface with generous negative space, perfectly framed by the surrounding items in a relaxed asymmetric triangle arrangement. Soft natural morning daylight from the right side of the frame, throwing long gentle diagonal shadows across the marble, warm bone tones, gentle warm glow across the surface. Shot on Sony A7IV 50mm lens directly overhead. Real photograph, not AI-generated, candid moment. Real surface texture and grain on the marble, slow Saturday morning breakfast ritual mood, palette of warm bone marble, oat ceramics, sage green, matcha green, brass. Minimalist editorial composition with deliberate emptiness at the lower-left.

fal_pulid_params.negative_prompt: extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated hands, bad anatomy, lowres, blurry, watermark, text, signature, distorted, plastic surfaces, oversaturated, AI-generated look, illustration, 3D render, CGI, persona face, hands in frame, body in frame

step_2_brief.intended_grip_or_placement: The Alluvi box sits at the lower-left third of the composition with its front face up to the camera, angled slightly toward the upper right. Surrounded by the matcha bowl, water glass, journal, plate, and eucalyptus arranged in a relaxed triangle.
step_2_brief.intended_product_position: Step 2 will composite the Alluvi box into the empty lower-left third of the marble surface, oriented with its front face up to the camera, angled slightly toward the upper right, with shadows matching the existing right-side morning daylight direction.

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: No persona in frame — id_weight lowered from 1.0 to 0.5 to prevent PuLID from forcing any partial face or hand artifact into the empty lower-left composition area where the product will be composited in Step 2.
